title: If Evangelion were redubbed
wikitext:
[]: If Evangelion were redubbed...             Quote Post by Trowa_Ayanami » Thu Aug 03, 2006 3:34 pm ...who would you choose to replace for the final line-up? Here's mine: Shinji - Vic Mignogna (Edward Elric - Fullmetal Alchemist, Gawl - Generator Gawl) Asuka - Kari Wahlgren (Fuu - Samurai Champloo, Haruko - FLCL) Touji - Chris Patton (Sousuke Sagara - Full Metal Panic) Kensuke - Joshua Seth (Hige - Wolf's Rain, Knives - Trigun) Kaworu - Johnny Yong Bosch (Kiba - Wolf's Rain, Vash - Trigun) Fuyutsuki - Travis Willingham (Roy Mustang - Fullmetal Alchemist) Gendo - Tom Wyner (Quent Yaiden - Wolf's Rain) Kaji - Steve Blum (Spike - Cowboy Bebop, Mugen - Samurai Champloo) What do you think?

[]:             Quote Post by System Shocker » Fri Aug 04, 2006 1:32 am now how about Japanese voice actors? I always wish the characters in anime shows could at least have Japanese accents for the English dubs.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Aug 04, 2006 5:48 pm I would have Evangelion redubbed into Japanese by American voice actors.

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Fri Aug 04, 2006 6:49 pm System Shocker wrote: now how about Japanese voice actors? I always wish the characters in anime shows could at least have Japanese accents for the English dubs.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri Aug 04, 2006 7:11 pm Kaji - David Lucas (Cowboy Bebop, X tv) Gendo - Crispin Freeman (Hellsing, X tv, Slayers, a million other things) Misato - Wendee Lee (Cowboy Bebop, X tv, Outlaw Star, a million other things) Rei - Ruby Marlowe (Serial Experiments Lain, Outlaw Star) Ritsuko - Mary Elizabeth McGlynn (Ghost in the Shell:SAC, Outlaw Star) Shinji - David Umansky (Cowboy Bebop, Mahoromatic)

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Fri Aug 04, 2006 9:22 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: I would have Evangelion redubbed into Japanese by American voice actors.

[]:             Quote Post by treeoflife » Thu Aug 10, 2006 11:44 pm As long as Tiffany Grant would be replaced, I'm happy. Though, that's not to say that I enjoyed Spike Spencer.

[]:             Quote Post by Ripple_in_Eternity » Fri Aug 11, 2006 1:00 am [deleted by user]

[]:             Quote Post by Israfel777 » Fri Aug 11, 2006 1:03 am Ripple_in_Eternity wrote: What about Nicolas Cage as Gendo?

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Fri Aug 11, 2006 1:05 am For the most part I think the existing dubs were fine. It's minor characters like the Bridge Bunnies that I think they did a mediocre job with.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Fri Aug 11, 2006 1:44 am The Eva Monkey wrote: I would have Evangelion redubbed into Japanese by American voice actors.

[]:             Quote Post by Ripple_in_Eternity » Fri Aug 11, 2006 1:42 pm [deleted by user]

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Fri Aug 11, 2006 1:47 pm If Eva was redubbed it would probably still suck. I will stick to my subs. Unless say the original Japanese VA's tried dubbing it into english. I might enjoy an "engrish" Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Sat Aug 12, 2006 4:41 pm William Schatner could be Shinji. "I don't want... To pilot the, Eva!"

[]:             Quote Post by the3rdchildren » Sat Aug 12, 2006 5:51 pm I like the current dub, and whenever I read the manga the voices just pop in fittingly. However I think AVD did a better job than Manga with the actors/actresses. Dubbed Gendo was especially cool, but didn't they replace him in their Renewal release?

[]:             Quote Post by ZeroFive1 » Sat Aug 12, 2006 7:05 pm What's wrong with Shinji being spike spence?

[]:             Quote Post by SEELE 08 » Sat Aug 12, 2006 7:10 pm Dubbed Gendo was especially cool, but didn't they replace him in their Renewal release?

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Mon Aug 14, 2006 7:02 pm IT NEVER SHOULD HAVE BEEN DUBBED!!!!!!!!! thats all folks

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Aug 14, 2006 8:32 pm Space Penis wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: I would have Evangelion redubbed into Japanese by American voice actors.

[]:             Quote Post by the3rdchildren » Mon Aug 14, 2006 8:46 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: You just haven't thought about it enough.

Here's mine: Shinji - Vic Mignogna (Edward Elric - Fullmetal Alchemist, Gawl - Generator Gawl) Asuka - Kari Wahlgren (Fuu - Samurai Champloo, Haruko - FLCL) Touji - Chris Patton (Sousuke Sagara - Full Metal Panic) Kensuke - Joshua Seth (Hige - Wolf&#39
